suggestedRules: For Swedish tourism/municipal sites, always probe /events, /kalender, /program paths
High-scoring derived-rule links (score >= 6) should be attempted in retry

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish tourism, municipal, and cultural sites with event listings

suggestedRules: Prioritize /events path as primary event listing for Swedish museum sites
Secondary paths /program and /kalender should be tried in order

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish cultural institutions and museums (fotografiska, design museums, art centers)

suggestedRules: Update source URL from fotografiska.se to fotografiska.com
Apply same event path rules as fotografiska source
Implement domain redirect following for Swedish .se → .com redirects
Create cross-domain rule for gronalund.se → gronalund.com
